originalTitle: ‘This is not a flash in the pan’: Why value stocks are beating growth by such a wide margin
summary: Value stocks are putting up big gains this year that widely surpass growth equities, with investors appearing optimistic about earnings growth broadening beyond technology.
content: Value stocks are putting up big gains this year that widely surpass growth equities, with investors appearing optimistic about earnings growth broadening beyond technology.
chineseTitle: “这不是昙花一现”：为何价值股大幅跑赢增长股
chineseSummary: 价值型股票今年的涨幅大幅超过成长型股票，投资者似乎对盈利增长范围扩大到科技以外的领域持乐观态度。
chineseContent: 价值型股票今年的涨幅大幅超过成长型股票，投资者似乎对盈利增长范围扩大到科技以外的领域持乐观态度。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
